# cBrowse

Hosted cBrowse relay and MCP surface for agent-controlled browser actions.

## Endpoints

- Hosted landing page: https://gamehub.qzz.io/
- MCP endpoint: https://gamehub.qzz.io/mcp
- Bridge WebSocket: wss://gamehub.qzz.io/bridge
- Raw cBrowse skill: https://gamehub.qzz.io/cbrowse-skill.md

## What It Does

- Lets an installed browser extension connect to a hosted bridge.
- Exposes browser actions over MCP for agent clients.
- Supports page inspection, navigation, clicking, typing, key presses, scrolling, and mouse movement.
- Provides a raw skill file for clients that support extra behavioral instructions.

## Setup

1. Install the cBrowse extension.
2. Use the browser-specific MCP endpoint generated by that extension in your agent client.
3. If your client supports skills or extra agent instructions, use the raw cBrowse skill file.
4. Ask the agent to claim a dedicated browser tab before acting.

## Hosted Status

- Live bridge status is available at https://gamehub.qzz.io/api/status
- The landing page shows bridge connectivity and the latest active agent/session information.
